Data ini membantu Anda memahami pola str: This data helps you understand stress patterns and build healthier habits.
AI Insight teks: Based on your last 2 assessments, the system detected that your stress level shows an increasing trend. This pattern often occurs when students face many deadlines in a short time.
Rekomendasi 1: Take short breaks every 90 minutes of studying
Rekomendasi 2: Use time-blocking techniques to organize your task schedule
Rekomendasi 3: Reduce caffeine consumption in the evening
Refleksi Mingguan teks: In your last 2 assessments, you showed an increasing stress level. This is likely related to the academic workload this week.
Refleksi Mingguan saran: Consider scheduling break time or relaxation activities to maintain your academic balance.
tip_jeda_desc: Take 5 minutes to breathe deeply every 2 hours.
tip_air_desc: Dehydration can worsen stress. Drink at least 8 glasses of water a day.
tip_olahraga_desc: A 15-minute walk can boost your mood and reduce stress.
tip_333_desc: When anxious, name 3 things you see, listen to 3 sounds, and move 3 body parts.
tip_teman_desc: Sharing problems with someone close can lighten your mental load.
tip_stretching_desc: Stretch your neck and shoulders every hour to reduce physical tension.
tip_sosmed_desc: Reduce screen time outside study or work hours to lower mental fatigue.
tip_pomodoro_desc: Use the Pomodoro method: 25 minutes of full focus, then a 5-minute break.
tip_5010_desc: Study for 50 minutes then take an active 10-minute break (stretch or walk) to refresh your brain.
tip_satu_tugas_desc: Multitasking increases mental fatigue. Finish one task before moving to another.
tip_54321_desc: When anxious, identify 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.
tip_journal_desc: Write down 3 things you are grateful for today before going to sleep.
tip_detox_desc: Turn off notifications 1 hour before bed for better sleep quality.
tip_nap_desc: A 20-30 minute nap can improve focus and reduce fatigue.
tip_meditasi_desc: Sit quietly, focus on your breath, and let thoughts flow without judgment.
tip_kafein_desc: Too much caffeine can increase anxiety. Limit to 2 cups per day.
Ingat untuk istirahat dan jaga kesehatan: Remember to rest and take care of your mental health.

q1: Have you been experiencing stress lately?

Desc No Stress: You are currently experiencing very low or no stress. Your mental condition is balanced and healthy.
Desc Eustress: Eustress (Positive Stress) - Stress that motivates and improves performance. This is a healthy level of stress.
Desc Distress: Distress (Negative Stress) - Stress that causes anxiety and disrupts well-being. Needs more attention to manage.

Tips Peningkatan Stres: Take time to rest, engage in relaxing activities like meditation or a light walk, and consider reducing your workload or non-urgent tasks.
Terjadi penurunan skor stres sebesar :va: There has been a decrease in your stress score by :value points. This is a positive sign that your mental condition is improving!
Tips Penurunan Stres: Maintain your current healthy lifestyle. Continue doing positive activities that help reduce stress, such as regular exercise, getting enough sleep, and keeping good social relationships.

Tips Stres Stabil: A stable condition is a good thing. Continue to monitor your mental condition regularly and maintain a balance between activities and rest.
